<> in php you can replace one url with another using string functions like str_replace or preg_replace. for example: $str = "new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $str = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $str); this will replace the first occurrence of the url in the string. if you want to replace all occurrences, you can use preg_replace with a regular expression: $str = preg_replace("/http:\/\/stackoverflow\.com\/xyz1/", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $str); this will replace all instances of the url in the string. to make it work for repeating strings, you can use a loop or a recursive function. a palindrome is a word, phrase, or sequence of characters that reads the same backward as forward. for example, "madam" or "racecar" are palindromes. in php, you can check if a string is a palindrome by comparing it to its reverse: function is_palindrome($str) { return $str === strrev($str); } this function will return true if the string is a palindrome and false otherwise. you can use this function to check if a string is a palindrome and then replace the url accordingly. the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier than sword the pen is mightier
